name: win-auto-workspace
description: Windows desktop automation framework skeleton with TS API, CLI, and napi-rs native addon.
author: Your Name

scripts.build: npm run build -w @win-auto/core && npm run build -w win-auto && npm run build:native
scripts.test: npm run test -w @win-auto/core && npm run test:e2e
scripts.example:notepad: node -e "require('./packages/core/dist').Automation && console.log('Build complete. Run examples/notepad.ts with your TS runner.')"
